explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while fats are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 48 from a base nutrition score of 48. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: easy protein delivery for normal diets
topPros.explanation: Dairy gets real credit for convenience.

topPros.title: clear calcium identity
topPros.explanation: That is a core category strength.

topCons.title: very dense and easy to overshoot

closing.summary: Parmesan stands out for easy protein delivery for normal diets and clear calcium identity. but it also gets held back by very dense and easy to overshoot and fat quality varies wildly across dairy. Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
